scripts.name: audit-stage-2-final
scripts.reason: Asserts /login, /client, /client/project/$id stay RouteStub and EstimateForm has no backend call. Stage 4 deliberately activated /client routes and EstimateForm wires to submit-estimate-request; failures are correct behavior for the post-stage-4 codebase.

scripts.name: audit-stage-2-regression-for-stage-3
scripts.reason: Same as above: requires /client to be RouteStub, intentionally no longer true.

scripts.name: audit-stage-3b
scripts.reason: Reads supabase/functions/submit-estimate-request-test/index.ts which was a Stage-3B test-only edge function removed during 3D/3E cleanup.

scripts.name: audit-stage-3f
scripts.reason: Requires Stage-3F build.log / typescript.log / archive-verify.log artifacts and Stage-3F test edge functions; these were one-shot stage artifacts (and test functions intentionally deleted at end of 3F).

verdict: All passing scripts pass. Failing scripts are stage-locked to pre-stage-4 invariants that Stage 4 intentionally changed, or to one-shot test artifacts that were cleaned up. No regressions.
